creator: maxsteciuk@gmail.com
text:
I see, so it comes down to /usr/ports/UIDs.
I followed the instructions on the page https://gitlab.fechner.net/mfechner/Gitlab-docu/blob/master/install/16.0-freebsd.md
Could you please help me understand how the git system user should be set up? Would the port installation do this and skip the user creation if the git user already exists? 
Thanks
Max
